title: Rare Bird Band
body:
# Rare Bird Band

**2022 CRFW Fund grantee.** Identified from an August 2023 grant-cycle email in which Jane Anne Ferguson refers to "the Rare Bird Band that we funded last year" — meaning their 2022 award. The plan in the same email contemplated having Rare Bird play at the proposed 2024 CRFW celebration event at the Evans School auditorium.

## Research gaps

- Members and full project details not yet located.
- Confirm whether they performed at the August 2024 CRFW celebration event.
- Bandcamp / Soundcloud presence not yet confirmed.

## Web-search status (2026-04-25, Session 13)

Public-web sweeps for `"Rare Bird Band" Denver Colorado music`, `"Rare Bird Band" Denver CRFW Fund grant`, `"Rare Birds" Denver Colorado band 2022`, and `"rare bird band" bandcamp soundcloud` returned **no Denver-specific match**. Bandcamp surfaces unrelated bands in Orcas Island WA, Richmond VA, Atlanta GA, Columbus OH, and Toronto. Wikipedia surfaces the 1969 English progressive-rock band of the same name. **No public web evidence** of the Denver-area band that received the 2022 CRFW grant.

This is consistent with the broader pattern Session 12b flagged: small Denver-scene bands often have no public footprint and have to be sourced from Gmail / family correspondence. A future Gmail sweep restricted to August 2022 (the grant-announcement window) is the most likely path to members and confirmation.

## Source

- Gmail thread `189f5e407e08005a` — "Fwd: CRFW Fund - Grant Cycle" (August 2023)
